name: io.github.neuraldraft/mcp
title: Neural Draft
description: MCP server exposing Neural Draft (CMS, blog, social, booking, commerce) to Claude Code, Cursor, Continue, and other AI coding tools. 30 tools covering brand, content, blog, images, video, pages, components, products, booking, forms, usage, and multi-workspace login.

environmentVariables.name: NEURALDRAFT_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Project API key from your Neural Draft dashboard. Format: ndsk_live_… (production) or ndsk_test_… (test mode). Get one at https://neuraldraft.io/dashboard/api-keys.

environmentVariables.name: NEURALDRAFT_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the API base URL. Defaults to https://api.neuraldraft.io/v1. Useful for staging or local dev.

environmentVariables.name: NEURALDRAFT_PROJECT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Optional project override when one API key spans multiple projects.

environmentVariables.name: NEURALDRAFT_DISPLAY_NAME
environmentVariables.description: Optional friendly server name shown in your IDE's MCP list (useful when you run multiple Neural Draft projects in parallel).
